column1: # Custom partition table for the beacon device (16MB flash).
# 3MB app + ~12.8MB LittleFS data partition → ~55 BMPs at 230KB each.
# Use it in the Arduino IDE:
#   Tools > Partition Scheme > "Custom"   (then this file is picked up from the
# The data partition MUST be labelled "spiffs" — that's the label LittleFS.begin()
# mounts by default. NVS holds the persistent shot counter (Preferences).
